task.json success.mode = 'program'; spec.program = 'verifier.py::verify_streaming_audit'

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic spreadsheet audit task with 8 streaming services (Netflix, Disney+, HBO Max, Spotify Premium, YouTube Premium, Hulu, Apple TV+, Amazon Prime). Key verified facts: 8 services with 3 annual and 5 monthly subscriptions, 300-second timeout, 50 max steps, medium difficulty, 6 success criteria with 75% (5/6) pass threshold. Data is entirely synthetic, programmatically generated with dynamic relative renewal dates. 3 services are shared (HBO Max, YouTube Premium, Amazon Prime), 1 has zero hours (Hulu for division-by-zero testing), and 3 renew within 30 days (HBO Max at 15 days, YouTube Premium and Amazon Prime at 25 days each). Requires 5 calculated columns with specific formulas: Monthly Cost (normalize annual by /12), Days to Renewal (TODAY() subtraction), Renewal Alert (flag if <=30 days), Cost/Hour (handle zero hours with IF), Amount Owed (50% split for shared subscriptions). Normalized monthly total cost is $89.53. All formula patterns and logic verified against README and verifier.py implementation.
